description: You are a Sales Administrator at Northwind Traders. Your top customer, 'Alfreds Futterkiste', has emailed a signed purchase order for their annual service contract. Enter this into Manager.io as a Sales Order. The 'Sales Orders' module is currently disabled and must be enabled to complete the task. Create a new Sales Order for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' using today's date and reference 'SO-90210'. The order must include a line item for 'Annual Priority Support Plan 2026' with a quantity of 1 and a unit price of 2400.
